name: Pinpoint Logic Circuit
descs:
When hitting an enemy with an Envy Affinity Skill or a Skill that inflicts [Combustion] Potency or 'Unique Burn', inflict additional [Combustion] Potency by half the Skill's total Coins. (rounded up)
- [Cannot Stack] When Move-in Reg. Heathcliff E.G.O Passive 「Circuit Wiring」 activates, this effect does not activate)

On Hit, if target has 99 [Combustion] Potency, inflict 1 [IDMicroChip] (once per enemy, 3 times per turn)
